features: Absorbs quickly with moisture lasting all day
Gives a fresh feeling and scent all day long
Free from mineral oils and colorants to care for your skin
Leaves the skin smooth, supple and velvety soft
description: Product Description Nivea Express Hydration Body Lotion is enriched with Sea Minerals and Hydra IQ, experience extra fast absorption and long-lasting moisture for normal skin. It has the ultra light formula with Sea Minerals works deep with the skin, repairing dryness layer by layer to make the skin immediately soft, supple and delicately enwrapped in a blue lotus scent. It's unique formula naturally promotes a continuous moisture supply from within for long-lasting soft skin. The formula supports the skin's own water channels to enhance your natural miniaturisation and leaves the skin smooth and velvety soft. It is Dermatologically tested and approved. Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Isopropyl Palmitate, Alcohol Denat., Glyceryl Stearate SE, Cetearyl Alcohol, Maris Sal, Dimethicone, Carbomer, Sodium Hydroxide, Sodium Cetearyl Sulfate, Phenoxyethanol, Linalool, Limonene, Benzyl Alcohol, Citronellol, Parfum Manufacturer Contact Information Beiersdorf AG, D-20245, Hamburg, Germany.
